title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 23 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 23 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 23 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/09/2025
Iron ore futures moved downwards a er a higher opening and remained in the doldrums throughout the day. The most-traded contractI2601 closed at 802.5, down 1.23% WoW. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills restocked based on demand.
